title: HMAS Waratah
summary: HMAS Waratah is a former Royal Australian Navy (RAN) naval administrative centre located in Washington, D.C., United States of America. The centre was operational between 1966 and as late as 1986. It was located in the Australian Embassy on Massachusetts Avenue NW.
